name: Agent Zero Hierarchy & Task Assignments
description: Complete organizational structure with Agent Zero and 5 subagents

lessons.title: Agent Zero - Master Orchestrator
lessons.content: Master controller for all operations. Routes tasks, coordinates execution, aggregates results. Runs on port 55015.

lessons.title: Subagent 1 - Learning Management (south-lms:6000)
lessons.content: Manages training courses, NZCI content, learning paths. Handles course queries, enrollment, progress tracking.

lessons.title: Subagent 2 - API Gateway (161:80)
lessons.content: Request routing, API coordination, load balancing between services. Central integration point.

lessons.title: Subagent 3 - Data Processor (unruffled_buck:80)
lessons.content: ETL operations, data transformation, validation, format conversion, data cleaning.

lessons.title: Subagent 4 - Analysis Service (ecstatic_mirzakhani:80)
lessons.content: Data analysis, reporting, metrics generation, dashboard creation, insights extraction.

lessons.title: Subagent 5 - ML/AI Service (magical_chaplygin:80)
lessons.content: Machine learning models, predictions, NLP processing, AI recommendations, pattern detection.

lessons.title: Level 1 - Critical (Agent Zero Only)
lessons.content: System configuration, security decisions, resource allocation, master workflow changes. Only Agent Zero executes.

lessons.title: Level 2 - Coordination (Agent Zero + Subagent 2)
lessons.content: Cross-service coordination, integration tasks, critical API operations. Agent Zero + API Gateway route to others.

lessons.title: Level 3 - Workflow (Multiple Subagents)
lessons.content: Data pipelines, analysis workflows, complex processing. 2-4 subagents work in parallel, Agent Zero orchestrates.

lessons.title: Level 4 - Routine (Single Subagent)
lessons.content: Individual service tasks, local processing, routine operations. Direct execution on single subagent.

lessons.title: Workflow: Generate Training Recommendations
lessons.content: Task Chain: Agent Zero → Subagent 1 (get courses) → Subagent 3 (prepare data) → Subagent 5 (ML recommendations) → Subagent 4 (create report) → Return to Agent Zero

lessons.title: Workflow: Analyze Course Performance
lessons.content: Task Chain: Agent Zero → Subagent 1 (metrics) → Subagent 3 (normalize) → Subagent 4 (analysis) → Subagent 5 (predict trends) → Return aggregated results

lessons.title: Workflow: Deploy New Course
lessons.content: Task Chain: Agent Zero → Subagent 1 (create structure) → Subagent 3 (validate content) → Subagent 4 (quality check) → Subagent 5 (auto-generate descriptions) → Subagent 2 (publish)

lessons.title: Workflow: Full Data Pipeline
lessons.content: Extract → Subagent 3 (transform) → Subagent 4 (analyze) → Subagent 5 (ML enrichment) → Subagent 1 (store) → Subagent 2 (API publish)

modules.title: Execution Model & Timing
modules.description: How tasks are executed and timing

lessons.title: Parallel Execution
lessons.content: Subagents 1, 3, 4, 5 execute simultaneously. Subagent 2 coordinates. Average response: 2-3 seconds for complex workflows.

lessons.title: Sequential Execution
lessons.content: When output of one task feeds into another. Example: Subagent 1 → Subagent 3 → Subagent 4. Used for dependent workflows.

lessons.title: Hybrid Execution
lessons.content: Combination of parallel and sequential. Example: 1+3 parallel, then result to 4+5 parallel, then 2 coordinates final output.

lessons.title: Agent Zero Coordination
lessons.content: Agent Zero waits for all subagent responses, merges results, handles conflicts, applies business logic, returns final result.

modules.title: Task Assignment & Routing Rules
modules.description: How tasks get routed to subagents

lessons.title: Learning/Training Tasks → Subagent 1 (LMS)
lessons.content: Any task involving courses, training, content management, enrollment. Primary: south-lms:6000

lessons.title: Integration/API Tasks → Subagent 2 (API Gateway)
lessons.content: Cross-service calls, coordination, routing, load balancing. Primary: 161:80

lessons.title: Data Processing Tasks → Subagent 3 (Processor)
lessons.content: ETL, validation, transformation, cleaning. Primary: unruffled_buck:80

lessons.title: Analysis/Reporting Tasks → Subagent 4 (Analysis)
lessons.content: Analytics, metrics, dashboards, insights, reports. Primary: ecstatic_mirzakhani:80

lessons.title: ML/Predictions → Subagent 5 (ML/AI)
lessons.content: Machine learning, recommendations, NLP, predictions, pattern detection. Primary: magical_chaplygin:80

modules.title: Performance & Optimization
modules.description: Speed up operations and optimize resource usage

lessons.title: Caching Strategy
lessons.content: LMS courses: 1-hour cache. Analysis results: 30-minute cache. ML predictions: real-time (no cache). Reduce redundant calls by 60%.

lessons.title: Load Balancing
lessons.content: Subagent 2 (API) acts as load balancer. Distributes requests across Subagents 1, 3, 4, 5. Prevents bottlenecks.

lessons.title: Maximize Parallelization
lessons.content: Run independent tasks simultaneously. Example: Get courses (Sub 1) + Fetch employee data (Sub 3) at same time. Saves 40-50% execution time.

lessons.title: Batch Processing
lessons.content: Group similar tasks together. Send 100 recommendations at once instead of 1 at a time. Improves throughput by 8x.

modules.title: n8n Orchestration Integration
modules.description: How n8n coordinates with Agent Zero and subagents

lessons.title: n8n Task Dispatcher
lessons.content: n8n receives tasks, routes to Agent Zero. Agent Zero orchestrates subagents. n8n waits for completion, aggregates, stores results.

lessons.title: n8n Webhook Triggers
lessons.content: Tasks arrive via webhook: POST /webhook/task-dispatch with task_type, priority, required_subagents, data payload.

lessons.title: Result Aggregation in n8n
lessons.content: n8n merges results from all subagents, applies business logic, formats response, stores in database/cache.

lessons.title: n8n Monitoring & Logging
lessons.content: Track execution time, error rates, success rates per subagent. Alert if any subagent response time > 5 seconds.

lessons.title: Subagent Failure Handling
lessons.content: If Subagent fails: retry 2x, log error, return partial results if others succeeded, alert Agent Zero.

lessons.title: Timeout Handling
lessons.content: If subagent doesn't respond in 5s: cancel task, retry with different subagent if available, return cached result if exists.

lessons.title: Cascading Failure Prevention
lessons.content: If Subagent 2 (API) fails: other subagents still work directly. If Agent Zero fails: subagents go into safe mode, accept only health checks.

lessons.title: Recovery Strategy
lessons.content: Auto-restart failed subagent. Re-queue failed tasks. Notify admin if repeated failures. Scale up healthy subagents.

lessons.title: Average Response Time
lessons.content: Target: 2-3 seconds for complex workflows. Measure: time from task received to final result returned.

lessons.title: Throughput
lessons.content: Target: 100+ tasks/hour. Measure: number of completed tasks per hour across all subagents.

lessons.title: Error Rate
lessons.content: Target: < 2%. Measure: failed tasks / total tasks. Alert if > 5%.

lessons.title: Subagent Health Score
lessons.content: Score 0-100 per subagent. Factors: uptime (40%), response time (30%), error rate (20%), throughput (10%).

assessments.title: Task Routing Exercise
assessments.description: Given business requirements, correctly route to appropriate subagent

assessments.title: Design Multi-Subagent Workflow
assessments.description: Create optimal workflow for complex business scenario

assessments.title: Optimize Workflow Performance
assessments.description: Identify bottlenecks and apply optimization techniques
